'''Nerf strips''' were a type of meat made from [[Nerf/Legends|nerf]]. They were served in [[Restaurant/Legends|diners]] across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], including [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
